name: Carrot, Zucchini and Potato Shreds
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the potatoes. Rinse with cold water, drain well and pat dry.
2. Grate the carrots and zucchini and combine with the potatoes.
3. Melt the butter in a large skillet on medium-high heat. When sizzling, add the vegetables and sauté for 2 minutes.
4. Add the basil, lower the heat to medium, cover and simmer for 7 to 10 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
Source: Fast & Fresh by Lucy Waverman
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE (YEA! RIGHT! You know me by now, CUT BACK ON THE FAT.)
